channel.title: tag2 on ExampleSite
channel.description: Recent content in tag2 on ExampleSite

item.title: ChatGPT has taken the world by storm. What's Next?
item.description: In this post, we talk about the techniques behind ChatGPT. We discuss possible applications around ChatGPT, and the impacts that it will bring to society. On April 11, 2022, I wrote this: “While current models may still have limited capacity, I’m optimistic that, we should see better and better AI models coming out in the future, and one day machines can have enough intelligence to handle tasks and jobs we do today.
